faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Woodlawn?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Woodlawn typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method chosen. Heat treatments for larger homes or multi-room infestations cost more than targeted chemical treatments for single rooms. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Woodlawn apartment?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Woodlawn apartments are completed in 4-8 hours for heat treatment or 2-3 hours for chemical application. You'll typically need to vacate the premises during treatment and can return the same day. A follow-up inspection is usually scheduled 2-3 weeks later to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Are bed bugs common in Woodlawn, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Yes, bed bugs are a common issue in Woodlawn due to the neighborhood's density, older housing stock, and proximity to public transportation on the 4 train and Metro-North. Apartment buildings, in particular, can experience infestations that spread between units if not treated promptly and professionally.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees for bed bug treatment in Woodlawn?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a warranty on our bed bug treatments in Woodlawn. If bed bugs return within the guarantee period (typically 30-90 days depending on the treatment type), we'll re-treat your property at no additional charge. Our guarantee requires following all preparation and prevention guidelines provided by our technicians.
